title: RBI Assigns Canara Bank as Lead Bank of Assam’s New Bajali District
description:
RBI has designated Canara Bank as the Lead Bank for the newly formed Bajali district in Assam. The circular follows the state's notification creating and demarcating the new district.
The post RBI Assigns Canara Bank as Lead Bank of Assam’s New Bajali District appeared first on TaxGuru.
